creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #5)

[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]$ /usr/bin/env ruby -e 'require "openssl"'
/usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.2/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:55:in `require': Shared object "libssl.so.38" not found, required by "openssl.so" - /usr/local/lib/ruby/2.2/amd64-freebsd10/openssl.so (LoadError)
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.2/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:55:in `require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/2.2/openssl.rb:17:in `<top (required)>'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.2/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:55:in `require'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/2.2/rubygems/core_ext/kernel_require.rb:55:in `require'
        from -e:1:in `<main>'
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]$

Rebuilt ruby, puppet builds fine now. Thank you!
